checks.name: required identity graph nodes
registered files exist
registered production files contain LeeWay headers
required file coverage is classified
webview to host commands are owned by identity graph
host to webview commands are owned by identity graph
handled commands are owned by identity graph
registered VS Code commands are owned by identity graph
manifest VS Code commands are owned by identity graph
LAVR emitted events are owned by identity graph
LAVR emitted events have registered consumers
identity graph evidence is registered
key source directories are covered by identity graph
historical dist start path is quarantined
checks.detail: Historical dist start path exists and is quarantined.

checks.name: context contamination exclusions are present
voice lock governing file exists
voice runtime configuration exists
LeeWay cloned speech pipeline exists
LeeWay live voice manifest exists
LeeWay live runtime engine is clone-local
LeeWay live runtime fallback is disabled
generated clone WAV outputs are classified
checks.detail: Generated clone files: 0; Classified node present: True

nodes.name: Application identity graph registry
nodes.runtimeRole: Defines the canonical LeeWay application node graph, command ownership, and active-file coverage model.

nodes.name: VS Code extension manifest entrypoint
nodes.runtimeRole: Declares the single production extension entrypoint and activation surface.

nodes.name: VS Code command registration manifest
nodes.runtimeRole: Declares the command palette and surfaced extension command contract.

nodes.name: Extension activation host
nodes.runtimeRole: Activates the extension host and owns the production runtime pipeline.

nodes.name: Agent Lee webview panel host
nodes.runtimeRole: Owns the primary webview panel lifecycle and boot logs.

nodes.name: Agent Lee webview runtime
nodes.runtimeRole: Renders the webview HTML runtime and binds UI controls to the runtime pipeline.

nodes.name: Runtime truth webview boot path
nodes.runtimeRole: Dynamically generates the Agent Lee webview HTML, executes the inline script, and proves that boot completes without hidden script failure.

nodes.name: Runtime truth chat send path
nodes.runtimeRole: Proves the send button emits sendMessage and that the extension host still declares a matching handler for the live chat path.

nodes.name: Extension runtime health classifier
nodes.runtimeRole: Classifies the active extension runtime as source, linked workspace, packaged VSIX, stale VSIX, or unknown and exposes the proof to the UI.

nodes.name: Webview message poster
nodes.runtimeRole: Owns host-to-panel UI updates and webview-visible runtime state posting.

nodes.name: Webview message handler
nodes.runtimeRole: Owns panel-to-host message handling for buttons, settings, approvals, and conversation routes.

nodes.name: Webview to host command router
nodes.runtimeRole: Owns commands emitted from the webview runtime into the extension host.

nodes.name: Host to webview command router
nodes.runtimeRole: Owns messages and UI state updates emitted from the extension host into the webview.

nodes.name: Runtime settings hydration
nodes.runtimeRole: Loads, normalizes, and persists runtime state for the active extension pipeline.

nodes.name: Workspace intelligence root
nodes.runtimeRole: Discovers workspace files, extracts local paths and URLs, and builds bounded context samples.

nodes.name: LeeWay write policy classifier
nodes.runtimeRole: Classifies governed files and excludes reports, knowledge, logs, and build output from live source treatment.

nodes.name: Remote context URL resolver
nodes.runtimeRole: Resolves remote URLs into controlled external context for Agent Lee tasks.

nodes.name: Background workspace indexer
nodes.runtimeRole: Owns background indexing, dependency lookup, and command-map oriented workspace summaries.

nodes.name: Model hive router
nodes.runtimeRole: Classifies task type and routes Builder, Designer, Verifier, visual, and web helper roles.

nodes.name: Local model hive code generation binding
nodes.runtimeRole: Binds local model output to LeeWay identity, classification, and verification law before generated code is accepted.

nodes.name: Model governance
nodes.runtimeRole: Applies governance rules to local model routing and usage.

nodes.name: Engineering loop root
nodes.runtimeRole: Owns inspect, plan, stage, approve, apply, verify, and receipt execution flow.

nodes.name: Engineering loop code generation binding
nodes.runtimeRole: Requires stage, apply, verify, and receipt flow to remain bound to LeeWay identity graph and integrity law.

nodes.name: Edit buffer command set
nodes.runtimeRole: Owns staged diff review, diff opening, accept/reject, and apply-and-verify command routes.

nodes.name: LeeWay application standards construction law
nodes.runtimeRole: Enforces LeeWay construction law for agents, autocomplete, repair flows, generated code, commands, events, pipelines, receipts, and cleanup plans.

nodes.name: LeeWay learned behavior enforcement
nodes.runtimeRole: Defines the standing behavior that requires all code-writing agents to begin from LeeWay identity instead of retrofitting governance after implementation.

nodes.name: LeeWay sovereign identity mesh registry
nodes.runtimeRole: Defines LeeWay ID families, identity records, sovereign layer anatomy, and tracer pack IDs for actor, prompt, intent, transaction, authority, gate, evidence, and receipt traceability.

nodes.name: LeeWay Tracer Pack root
nodes.runtimeRole: Requires every LeeWay action, rejection, quarantine, conversion, or agent induction to be reconstructable from a tracer pack.

nodes.name: Untrusted LLM ingress tracer
nodes.runtimeRole: Captures untrusted LLM source, actor ID, prompt ID, intent ID, transaction ID, authority ID, gate decision, evidence ID, and receipt ID.

nodes.name: Tracer Pack quarantine record
nodes.runtimeRole: Requires rejected or untrusted actions to preserve quarantine identity, evidence, and receipt references.

nodes.name: Tracer Pack rejection receipt
nodes.runtimeRole: Requires rejected actions to preserve receipt IDs that can reconstruct the violated policy and rejecting gate.

nodes.name: Public-safe tracer report template
nodes.runtimeRole: Defines the public-safe disclosure shape for corruption, rejection, quarantine, or untrusted ingress without leaking private data.

nodes.name: Tracer Pack human review gate
nodes.runtimeRole: Prevents automatic public disclosure or dangerous action without human review and approval.

nodes.name: Law engine root
nodes.runtimeRole: Blocks force-push, overwrite-core, unsafe-terminal, direct-main-push, and bulk-delete actions.

nodes.name: Standalone connectivity loader
nodes.runtimeRole: Resolves canonical standalone roots for SDK, MCP, agents, governance, and persona assets.

nodes.name: Codex code generation law binding
nodes.runtimeRole: Binds Codex-generated work in this repository to LeeWay identity, classification, receipts, and gates from the first draft.

nodes.name: ChatGPT-style agent law binding
nodes.runtimeRole: Binds repo-facing agent behavior to LeeWay construction law before code, cleanup, or repair is considered complete.

nodes.name: Autocomplete law binding
nodes.runtimeRole: Requires autocomplete-produced code to inherit LeeWay identity, file classification, and gate closure rules.

nodes.name: MCP agent law binding
nodes.runtimeRole: Binds MCP-routed and plugin-routed agent output to LeeWay identity graph and integrity-gate requirements.

nodes.name: Persona runtime bridge
nodes.runtimeRole: Builds the Agent Lee runtime prompt from sovereign persona, heritage canon, and anti-generic rules.

nodes.name: Capability catalog builder
nodes.runtimeRole: Builds the live capability catalog from MCP, agent, and server sources.

nodes.name: Plugin and MCP router
nodes.runtimeRole: Owns plugin routing, plugin guards, registry lookup, and adapter dispatch.

nodes.name: Internal tool router
nodes.runtimeRole: Owns internal tool routing including scan, verify, web-search, image, and permission helpers.

nodes.name: Browser validator root
nodes.runtimeRole: Owns Playwright session startup, visual evidence capture, flow execution, performance, and accessibility checks.

nodes.name: Local memory ledger
nodes.runtimeRole: Writes runtime and agent-event memory ledgers for continuity and audit.

nodes.name: Knowledge repo indexer
nodes.runtimeRole: Indexes workspace source into the knowledge store while excluding reports, knowledge, memory, logs, and build output.

nodes.name: Voice lock governing law
nodes.runtimeRole: Locks the active Agent Lee live clone identity and route order unless an explicit re-audition is approved.

nodes.name: Voice runtime configuration
nodes.runtimeRole: Defines the active LeeWay-owned live clone runtime, clone reference audio, and live clone output path.

nodes.name: Live clone output asset
nodes.runtimeRole: Registers the active live clone output path that the runtime writes when local clone playback is enabled.

nodes.name: Test clone output asset
nodes.runtimeRole: Registers the dedicated test clone output path used by the extension voice clone preview and test flow.

nodes.name: Generated cloned WAV outputs
nodes.runtimeRole: Generates transient GUID-named clone WAV outputs that are candidates for future isolated cleanup but are not production-owned assets.

nodes.name: LeeWay live voice route manager
nodes.runtimeRole: Owns LeeWay live voice manifest loading, route health assessment, and normal-vs-emergency route selection.

nodes.name: Primary live clone route
nodes.runtimeRole: Declares the first-priority LeeWay-owned live clone route for Agent Lee speech.

nodes.name: Compact live clone route
nodes.runtimeRole: Declares the second-priority compact LeeWay clone route when the primary clone route is unhealthy.

nodes.name: Branded LeeWay live route
nodes.runtimeRole: Declares the branded LeeWay live voice route used only after clone routes are unavailable.

nodes.name: Text-only voice emergency route
nodes.runtimeRole: Declares the truthful text-only emergency route when no LeeWay-owned live voice route is healthy.

nodes.name: No foreign default voice policy
nodes.runtimeRole: Rejects non-LeeWay voice runtimes as Agent Lee's default or normal fallback route.

nodes.name: LeeWay-owned-only voice policy
nodes.runtimeRole: Rejects external provider routes during normal Agent Lee voice operation.

nodes.name: Live voice runtime truth
nodes.runtimeRole: Proves LeeWay live voice route order, foreign-runtime rejection, external-provider rejection, emergency truth, and one-word failure detection.

nodes.name: LeeWay Agent Voice local runtime
nodes.runtimeRole: Primary local-only voice runtime for transcript bridge driven voice turns.

nodes.name: LeeWay Agent Voice browser fallback
nodes.runtimeRole: Fallback browser speech runtime used only when local browser microphone capture is needed.

nodes.name: LAVR turn gate
nodes.runtimeRole: Owns utterance lifecycle, partial/final aggregation, commit scheduling, and turn commit emission.

nodes.name: LAVR tool bus
nodes.runtimeRole: Owns tool request routing, tool completion propagation, and tool timeout/error handling.

nodes.name: LAVR playback gate
nodes.runtimeRole: Owns assistant playback lifecycle, stale segment suppression, and stop/cancel deduplication.

nodes.name: LAVR transcript bridge
nodes.runtimeRole: Owns localhost transcript intake and forwards accepted text into the voice command path.

nodes.name: LAVR interrupt gate
nodes.runtimeRole: Bridges runtime interrupt events from the provider layer into the host command router.

nodes.name: Live voice command family
nodes.runtimeRole: Registers the live voice command surface for transcript bridge, speech status, session controls, and file blocking.

nodes.name: VSIX package build
nodes.runtimeRole: Builds the extension package that the integrity gate inspects.

nodes.name: VSIX package leakage scan
nodes.runtimeRole: Scans the packaged VSIX surface for stale artifacts and excluded providers.
verification: VSIX stale artifact and cloud-provider leakage scan

nodes.name: VSIX runtime hash attestation
nodes.runtimeRole: Extracts the packaged VSIX runtime and proves it matches the repo build hash for out/extension.js.

nodes.name: Installed runtime hash attestation
nodes.runtimeRole: Hashes the installed extension runtime when present and fails integrity if the installed runtime is stale relative to the freshly packaged VSIX.

nodes.name: Package surface ignore rules
nodes.runtimeRole: Defines the non-shipping package surface and excludes debug, test, and stale adapter artifacts.
verification: VSIX stale artifact and cloud-provider leakage scan

nodes.name: Release metadata sync
nodes.runtimeRole: Prevents package.json and package-lock.json drift before packaging.

nodes.name: Deterministic VSIX writer
nodes.runtimeRole: Writes the versioned VSIX package using the canonical package manifest.

nodes.name: Runtime build-info generator
nodes.runtimeRole: Generates deterministic build info so the running extension can prove whether it matches the source workspace or a packaged VSIX.

nodes.name: Runtime build-info artifact
nodes.runtimeRole: Carries version, hash, command, and asset proof for runtime truth and stale VSIX detection.

nodes.name: Extension asset check
nodes.runtimeRole: Verifies icon assets, README image paths, ignore rules, and packaged asset coverage before release.

nodes.name: Installed extension runtime check
nodes.runtimeRole: Detects the installed Agent Lee extension, verifies build info and assets, and flags stale VSIX drift.

nodes.name: Release packaging orchestrator
nodes.runtimeRole: Runs release-only checks, builds the VSIX, inspects packaged contents, and writes release evidence.

nodes.name: Source dev reload workflow
nodes.runtimeRole: Promotes Extension Development Host as the normal source loop and writes dev reload evidence.

nodes.name: Historical dist start-path quarantine
nodes.runtimeRole: Historical dist output must never be treated as the active production start path while out/extension.js is canonical.

nodes.name: LeeWay application integrity gate
nodes.runtimeRole: Verification-only application integrity gate for runtime, packaging, and governance checks.

nodes.name: Generated app governance harness
nodes.runtimeRole: Proves LeeWay-created app planning includes Paired AdminOS, draft/published projection, owner education, proposal agents, MCP governance, and static-only exception handling.

nodes.name: LeeWay construction law gate
nodes.runtimeRole: Verifies the skill layer, repo law layer, instruction surfaces, code-generation bindings, and smoke-test evidence for LeeWay construction law.

nodes.name: LeeWay identity mesh gate
nodes.runtimeRole: Verifies LeeWay ID families, identity records, sovereign layer anatomy, and tracer pack ID coverage.

nodes.name: LeeWay tracer pack gate
nodes.runtimeRole: Verifies tracer pack law, skill standard, TRACE IDs, ingress requirements, quarantine receipt requirements, public-safe reporting, and integrity-gate wiring.

nodes.name: Application identity graph gate
nodes.runtimeRole: Verifies node registration, command ownership, active-file coverage, quarantine paths, and identity evidence.

nodes.name: LeeWay identity pulse law root
nodes.runtimeRole: Defines the living LeeWay law for origin, lineage, trust, authority, induction, and no-anonymous-object activation.

nodes.name: LeeWay identity pulse origin classifier
nodes.runtimeRole: Defines origin statuses, strict surfaces, trust semantics, and managed pulse objects for pass 1.

nodes.name: LeeWay born watermark overlay
nodes.runtimeRole: Teaches the repo-local standards overlay how LeeWay-born and imported objects differ for trust and activation.

nodes.name: Foreign entity induction skill overlay
nodes.runtimeRole: Extends local LeeWay instructions so imports, uploads, downloads, restores, and tool or LLM output must be inducted before activation.

nodes.name: Unknown object quarantine gate
nodes.runtimeRole: Finds unrecognized governed files in strict or audit scope and marks them for classification, quarantine, or refusal of authority.

nodes.name: Identity pulse hash attestation
nodes.runtimeRole: Attests hashes for governed files, repo runtime, VSIX runtime, and installed runtime as identity pulse artifacts.

nodes.name: Identity pulse first-seen ledger
nodes.runtimeRole: Persists first-seen, last-seen, origin, hash, trust, and receipt metadata for pulse-tracked objects.

nodes.name: LeeWay identity pulse gate
nodes.runtimeRole: Builds and verifies the living identity pulse registry for active files, runtime controls, commands, state keys, artifacts, docs, and imported trust boundaries.

nodes.name: Agent Lee doctor baseline
nodes.runtimeRole: Runs baseline doctor and LeeWay compliance checks for governed artifacts.

nodes.name: VS Code extension README root
nodes.runtimeRole: Owns the packaged README surface and its governed descriptive contract for the extension.

nodes.name: VS Code extension README media assets
nodes.runtimeRole: Owns the packaged README image assets that must never drift into anonymous or mismatched media.

nodes.name: README live proof surface
nodes.runtimeRole: Proves README version, image order, and source/package/installed/live proof alignment for the extension documentation surface.

nodes.name: Activity Bar icon asset
nodes.runtimeRole: Provides the packaged monochrome Activity Bar icon so the Agent Lee view remains visible and theme-safe in VS Code.

nodes.name: Chat avatar asset
nodes.runtimeRole: Provides the dedicated Agent Lee chat header avatar for the live webview identity surface.

nodes.name: LeeWay asset registry
nodes.runtimeRole: Defines the canonical LeeWay asset IDs, ownership, source/package/install paths, and evidence requirements for all owner-facing extension branding surfaces.

nodes.name: LeeWay header compliance
nodes.runtimeRole: Validates LeeWay header presence and governed file compliance.

nodes.name: Extension development launch configuration
nodes.runtimeRole: Makes F5 launch the Extension Development Host against the Agent Lee source tree.

nodes.name: Extension development task configuration
nodes.runtimeRole: Defines compile, dev reload, and release package tasks so source development replaces VSIX reinstall loops.

nodes.name: Primary extension command surface
nodes.runtimeRole: Registers the core Agent Lee open, scan, verify, engineer, patch, receipt, and runtime commands.

nodes.name: Legacy manifest command surface
nodes.runtimeRole: Manifest-only commands kept visible for audit until they are either rewired or removed.

nodes.name: Visual intelligence command surface
nodes.runtimeRole: Registers and owns the LVIS panel and visual-system command routes.

nodes.name: Voice bridge command surface
nodes.runtimeRole: Registers internal voice-bridge runtime status and transcript handling commands used by the governed local transcript lane.

nodes.name: Coding session command surface
nodes.runtimeRole: Registers and owns coding-session start, pause, resume, status, summary, and export receipt commands.

nodes.name: Performance command surface
nodes.runtimeRole: Registers performance profile, override, service, and status command routes.

nodes.name: Indexing command surface
nodes.runtimeRole: Registers background indexing, dependency, command-map, and symbol-search commands.

nodes.name: Runtime truth webview button bridge harness
nodes.runtimeRole: Executes the generated webview HTML and inline script in a dynamic harness, verifies core button behavior, and attests the live host/webview bridge.

nodes.name: Voice enabled control
nodes.runtimeRole: Owns the governed voice-enabled toggle, persisted hydration, and command mapping for LeeWay live voice output.

nodes.name: Voice mute toggle control
nodes.runtimeRole: Owns the governed mute toggle for LeeWay live voice playback.

nodes.name: Voice stop speaking control
nodes.runtimeRole: Owns the governed stop-speaking control for LeeWay live voice playback.

nodes.name: Voice test control
nodes.runtimeRole: Owns the governed test-voice control for LeeWay live voice audible output proof.

nodes.name: Speech rate control
nodes.runtimeRole: Owns the governed speech-rate slider and its persisted runtime effect on the LeeWay live route.

nodes.name: Speech volume control
nodes.runtimeRole: Owns the governed speech-volume slider and its persisted runtime effect on the LeeWay live route.

nodes.name: Auto speak responses control
nodes.runtimeRole: Owns the governed auto-speak toggle for assistant responses.

nodes.name: Live voice audible output proof surface
nodes.runtimeRole: Surfaces visible proof that the LeeWay-owned route generated playable audio artifacts and lifecycle evidence.

nodes.name: Live voice first-audio latency evidence
nodes.runtimeRole: Measures and emits first-audio latency for each LeeWay-owned live voice playback segment.

nodes.name: Live voice multi-segment playback evidence
nodes.runtimeRole: Tracks planned versus played LeeWay live voice segments and proves multi-segment completion.

nodes.name: Live voice clone engine error surface
nodes.runtimeRole: Surfaces live clone engine failures visibly in the governed UI instead of allowing silent voice failure.

nodes.name: Active runtime attestation
nodes.runtimeRole: Proves the active runtime version, UI generation, host/runtime IDs, build hash, and split-brain truth across source, package, install, and live host evidence.

nodes.name: Live host self-attestation
nodes.runtimeRole: Writes a host-authored attestation from inside extension activation so live runtime truth comes from the running extension host instead of indirect log inference.

nodes.name: Installed stale-instance quarantine
nodes.runtimeRole: Quarantines stale extension folders across all discovered VS Code extension roots, records cleanup evidence, and reinstalls only the intended governed VSIX lane.

nodes.name: Legacy update lane quarantine
nodes.runtimeRole: Prevents the historical direct-update script from acting as an independent installer by routing all calls into the governed stale-instance quarantine lane.

nodes.name: Right-side open behavior truth surface
nodes.runtimeRole: Owns best-effort right-side opening behavior, truthful fallback reporting, and owner-visible surface placement telemetry.
verification: runtime truth webview button bridge harness

nodes.name: Prompt intent classification workflow
nodes.runtimeRole: Classifies incoming prompts before workspace-heavy loading or mutation routing begins.

nodes.name: Greeting fast-lane workflow
nodes.runtimeRole: Answers simple greetings without broad workspace ingestion and records timing telemetry for the owner-visible fast lane.

nodes.name: Workspace context load workflow
nodes.runtimeRole: Loads broader workspace context only when the classified request requires it and reports that cost truthfully.

nodes.name: Update channel truth surface
nodes.runtimeRole: Classifies dev host, local VSIX, marketplace, Open VSX, private registry, or unknown update channels without misrepresenting auto-update capabilities.

nodes.name: Evidence consistency root
nodes.runtimeRole: Scans receipts and evidence files for contradictions and blocks stale PASS claims from outliving newer live FAIL proof.

nodes.name: Runtime incident closure gate
nodes.runtimeRole: Runs the full runtime alignment closure sequence and reports PASS, PARTIAL, or FAIL only when all critical surfaces agree.

nodes.name: LAVR runtime smoke harness
nodes.runtimeRole: Exercises runtime provider selection and local/fallback behavior.

nodes.name: LAVR host router dynamic harness
nodes.runtimeRole: Exercises emitted versus handled host router behavior for LAVR flows.

nodes.name: LAVR playback gate dynamic harness
nodes.runtimeRole: Exercises playback stop/cancel and stale segment suppression behavior.

nodes.name: LAVR audible output dynamic harness
nodes.runtimeRole: Executes the generated webview HTML, hydrates governed voice controls, and proves LeeWay live voice audible-output routing, latency capture, multi-segment completion, and visible error surfacing.
